subcodes.first_line: A Tablet revealed in truth, from whose horizon hath shone forth the Sun of God's bounty, the Lord of the mighty Throne. Blessed is he who seeketh from afar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح نزل بالحق و لاحت من افقه شمس عطاء الله رب العرش العظیم طوبی لبعید قصد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the power of words; of speech, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
